text:
There was an old man living alone. He lived peacefully, sitting alone. He had nothing. His wife died years ago. One afternoon he saw an old lady walking slowly. He waved. She smiled. They chatted. He helped her. She thanked him. Later she asked directions. He took her home. She hugged him tight. Said goodbye.

He never saw her again. Later he bought flowers. Thought of her. Planted seeds. Nothing grew. Decided too boring gardening. Just took books from library. Read about love.

She came again. This time fell asleep. Dreamed.

The old man smiled widely. Found her!

They walked hand in hand. Dreamed forever.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
